title: This 3D-printed electric motorbike folds into your luggage creator warns it is 'super fast... way too fast'
summary: Ivan Miranda has released the design files for the Mirandetta, a 3D-printed electric scooter that folds to fit inside a suitcase. This innovative motorbike combines convenience with speed. The creator warns users about its high speed.
insight: Convenience and speed come at the cost of caution needed.

title: Hotspot temperature sensor on Nvidia's Blackwell gaming GPUs is still accessible if you have access to Nvidia's internal MODS tool Nvidia RTX 5070 Ti caught throttling at 107 C over poor TIM application
summary: Nvidia's RTX 50 series hides hotspot temperature, but internal tools can still read it. The data reveals GPUs can easily overheat and throttle. This may be why the sensor is hidden.
insight: Hidden temperature data may hide underlying GPU overheating issues.

title: Newegg packs Ryzen 5 9600X and 16GB DDR5 into a $520 combo bundles also include a B650 motherboard and 240mm AIO liquid cooler
summary: Newegg offers a budget-friendly combo bundle for gamers, including a Ryzen 5 9600X processor, Gigabyte B650M motherboard, 16GB Corsair DDR5 memory, and a free 240mm AIO liquid cooler all for $520.
insight: Affordable AM5 PC build option for budget-conscious gamers emerges.

title: Microsoft loses Brazilian court case after telling hacked Xbox user to re-purchase games tech giant ordered to restore Xbox account with all games and pay $400 in damages
summary: A Brazilian gamer won a court case against Microsoft, requiring the company to restore his Xbox account and all digital games.
insight: Consumer rights prevail over corporate policies in digital ownership disputes.

title: AMD RX 9070 GRE collapses to $499 to save 1440p gaming RDNA 4 price slips 9% to steal a piece of Nvidia's mid-range pie
summary: AMD's Radeon RX 9070 GRE received its first price cut to $499, making it a more competitive option for 1440p gaming. This price drop is 9% less than Nvidia's RTX 5060 Ti 16GB. The RX 9070 GRE now offers a more compelling alternative to Nvidia's mid-range GPU.
insight: AMD challenges Nvidia's mid-range dominance with more affordable RDNA 4 GPU.

title: SK Hynix says 2027 will be the 'worst year' for memory shortage, forecasts crunch to last until 2030 CEO shares grim outlook on the day SK Hynix gets listed on Nasdaq
summary: SK Hynix CEO forecasts memory shortage to worsen in 2027, lasting until at least 2030.
insight: Global semiconductor shortages will intensify supply chain disruptions significantly.

title: Microsoft struggles to fulfill its 2030 sustainability promise amid carbon-heavy AI expansions the company's chief sustainability officer claims the target is still feasible
summary: Microsoft's carbon emissions surged 25% in FY2025 due to AI expansion, despite sustainability progress. The company's water conservation and waste reduction efforts are notable, but not enough to offset the carbon impact. The AI-driven growth outpaced efforts to reduce emissions.
insight: Rapid AI growth threatens Microsoft's ambitious 2030 carbon neutrality goal.

title: Razer Soma Chroma Gaming Chair Review: Light on adjustability, but heavy on RGBs
summary: The Razer Soma Chroma Gaming Chair offers vibrant RGB lights for $499, but has limited adjustability options.
insight: Expensive RGB experience may not justify limited adjustability features.

title: Colibr proof-of-concept gains frontier-level 1.5-TB AI model novel approach runs on only 25GB of RAM and shows promise for local AI setups
summary: Colibr proof-of-concept successfully runs a frontier-level 1.5-TB AI model on 25 GB of RAM and a modest CPU, paving the way for local AI setups. This achievement demonstrates efficient resource utilization and scalability.
insight: Efficient AI model deployment on limited hardware resources is achievable.

title: Fake Go DNS scanner spread malware through over 200 GitHub repos 'Operation Muck and Load' has published 700 malicious modules since January
summary: A malicious module, 'Operation Muck and Load', has infected over 200 GitHub repos with malware, accumulating 1,200 versions since January 24. The module, a fake Go DNS scanner, has published 700 malicious modules since its inception. This has significant implications for cybersecurity.
insight: Malicious code can spread rapidly through open-source repositories

title: Flock cameras mistakenly track car reviewer over 'stolen' tags police ambush tester in store parking lot and detain him for an hour
summary: Flock AI cameras mistakenly flagged a car with non-standard plates, leading to an hour-long detention. The mistake occurred due to the cameras struggling to read the smaller digits on the New Jersey plate. The incident highlights the potential for errors in automated surveillance systems.
insight: AI-powered surveillance systems can be prone to errors and misidentification.

title: Beelink EQi review Part 2: An Intel Core 3 304 Wildcat Lake mini PC tested with Windows 11 Pro
summary: The Beelink EQi Wildcat Lake mini PC, powered by an Intel Core i3-304 processor, is put through various tests including benchmarking, video playback, and network performance evaluation on Windows 11 Pro. The review provides a detailed assessment of its features, capabilities, and performance. The mini PC is also evaluated for its cooling performance, fan noise, and power consumption.
insight: Intel Core i3-304 mini PC delivers solid performance with Windows 11 Pro

title: This ransomware negotiator was paid to fight hackers, he was secretly working with them instead
summary: A ransomware negotiator secretly worked with hackers instead of fighting them, exploiting confidential information.
insight: Trust is broken in the fight against cybercrime and ransomware payments.

title: EA's College Football 27 is getting review-bombed over hidden single-player microtransactions
summary: College Football 27 is facing backlash for 'predatory' microtransactions in single-player modes, despite initial praise for engaging gameplay and graphics.
insight: Gamers feel deceived by microtransactions' presence in offline single-player modes.

title: WhatsApp desktop turns your PC into a full messaging hub
summary: WhatsApp's desktop app turns your PC into a full messaging hub, allowing you to link up to four devices at once and make voice and video calls with ease.
insight: Effortless multitasking for seamless conversations and productivity.

title: This MIT robot flies through the air then dives underwater using the same wings
summary: A robot developed at MIT can fly through the air and dive underwater using the same wings, mimicking the abilities of seabirds like puffins. This achievement demonstrates a more versatile and efficient use of wing technology. The robot's design could lead to new applications in ocean exploration and conservation.
insight: Adaptable wing design can bridge the air-water efficiency gap
